NavBar.openSourceCoworkDesc: From context to action — AI workforce on desktop automates your operations in any scenarios.
NavBar.environmentsForAgentsDesc: Continuous Evals to Train Agents for Your Workflows
NavBar.openSourceFrameworkDesc: Core, foundation, and application components for building scalable multi-agent systems.
NavBar.researchWithUsDesc: Partner with the CAMEL-AI community to explore new scaling laws, benchmarks, and agent architectures. Join our open research initiatives and shape the future of multi-agent systems.
NavBar.discordDesc: Chat with the community in real-time.
NavBar.ambassadorProgramDesc: Lead local communities and evangelize agents.
NavBar.joinAmbassadorProgramDesc: Become a CAMEL-AI Ambassador and lead the multi-agent community in your region. Get exclusive access to resources, events, and the core team.

camel.title: CAMEL
camel.description: The first and the best multi-agent framework.

owl.title: OWL
owl.description: Optimized Workforce Learning for Multi-Agent Assistance

Footer.slogan: Finding the Scaling Laws of Agents.
Footer.subscribeDesc: Subscribe to get product updates, research highlights, and new frameworks for building your fully local AI workforce.
Footer.mission: Building the world's first and best multi-agent framework to power autonomous, reliable AI workforces.

hero.description: CAMEL-AI is an open-source community for finding the scaling laws of agents for data generation, world simulation, task automation.

camel.body: Camel coordinates large populations of specialized agents, routing work, sharing tools, and learning optimal division of labor from experience.

owl.body: Owl monitors thousands of concurrent trajectories, surfaces anomalies, and turns messy traces into clean metrics and dashboards.

seta.body: Seta turns raw interaction data into curricula, shaping agents that can adapt, specialize, and transfer skills across tasks.

oasis.body: OASIS is the environment where these systems meet: dense, noisy, and open-ended enough for emergent behavior to appear.

mission.description: We believe that studying intelligent agents and multi-agent systems agents on a large scale offers valuable insights into their behaviors, capabilities, and potential risks.

research.title: Advancing Multi-Agent Research
research.description: We conduct foundational research on multi-agent systems, investigating the principles that shape performance and emergent behavior at scale, and developing methods to make these systems more reliable, interpretable, and robust.
research.researchInvite: We warmly invite you to use CAMEL for your impactful research.
research.researchDescription: Rigorous research takes time and resources. We are a community-driven research collective with 100+ researchers exploring the frontier research of Multi-agent Systems and intelligent agents for real-world automation. Join our ongoing projects or test new ideas with us.

principles.title: CAMEL Framework Design Principles
principles.description: Four core principles guide how we build data-driven, stateful, and scalable multi-agent systems.

items.title: Evolvability
items.description: Agents can continuously evolve via data generation and interactions with their environment, driven by reinforcement or supervised learning.

items.title: Scalability
items.description: Systems with millions of agents can be built, ensuring efficient coordination, communication, and resource management at scale.

items.title: Statefulness
items.description: Agent context is managed as a state transition process, supporting rich, dynamic memory management over time.

items.title: Code-as-prompt
items.description: Each line of code or comment serves as a prompt, ensuring that both humans and agents can interpret and extend it effectively.

capabilities.title: Unique Capabilities of CAMEL Framework
capabilities.description: Discover the powerful features that make CAMEL the leading framework for building advanced AI agent systems and multi-agent workflows.

cards.title: Workforce
cards.description: Model real agent workforces with roles, hierarchies, and long-horizon tasks.

cards.title: CAMEL Toolkit
cards.description: Batteries-included toolkit for messaging, planning, evaluation, and observability.

cards.title: Connect to RL
cards.description: Close the loop from interaction logs to RL and fine-tuning pipelines.

cards.title: Research Ecosystem
cards.description: Built on state-of-the-art CAMEL/OASIS research with open benchmarks and datasets.

techStack.title: Create Powerful Agentic Applications with Our Tools
techStack.description: A comprehensive ecosystem of tools, frameworks, and integrations to build production-ready multi-agent systems.

community.title: Join Our Community
community.description: Connect with other CAMEL users and get support from the community.
